codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested audio transcription, translation, and speech surfaces with strong contract coverage for multipart shaping, typed response dispatch, diarization metadata, speech binary decoding, and a live smoke. However, the transcription streaming implementation still accepts an EOF-truncated stream as a successful `stream()` call even when no terminal `transcript.text.done` event was ever observed, which violates the SDK's documented streaming contract. The translation surface also delays the unsupported `diarized_json` validation until after sending the HTTP request.

issues.description: `Transcriptions::stream()` eagerly drains the entire SSE response before returning (lines 364-407), so it has enough information to reject incomplete streams immediately. But `TranscriptionAccumulator::finish()` only errors when `[DONE]` was seen without a `transcript.text.done` event; if the connection ends early with plain EOF, `stream()` still returns `Ok(TranscriptionStream)` and only defers the failure until a later `final_text()`/`final_usage()` call. That violates the repository streaming rule that a stream is only successful once the documented terminal event has been observed, and it lets truncated transcriptions masquerade as successful stream creations.`

`Translations::create()` allows `AudioResponseFormat::DiarizedJson` through request construction and only rejects it later inside `parse_translation_response()` (line 925), after the POST has already been sent. Because this unsupported format is a deterministic local invariant for the translation surface, it should be rejected before the network call rather than spending an avoidable request on an invalid option.`

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `sdk-surface-worker` skill says public-family API changes in mission Exec Mode should still record an in-session brainstorming comparison in the handoff, but this run shows no `brainstorming` step and no chosen-vs-rejected design note while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is still marked true. That makes the requirement ambiguous for future workers and reviewers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/sdk-surface-worker/SKILL.md` lines 16 and 24 require a brainstorming/design-comparison step in Exec Mode. The transcript skeleton for worker session `0e158b1a-41be-4988-aa1c-cf50066ae37a` includes `test-driven-development`, `verification-before-completion`, and `systematic-debugging`, but no `brainstorming` invocation. The handoff file `2026-04-05T22-30-36-234Z__audio-transcription-translation-and-speech__0e158b1a-41be-4988-aa1c-cf50066ae37a.json` contains no `rejected`/`alternative` design note and still records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Review failed. The feature covers the main audio surfaces well, but `audio.transcriptions.stream()` currently treats EOF-truncated streams as successful before a terminal `transcript.text.done` event is observed, and `audio.translations.create()` validates unsupported `diarized_json` too late. Report written to `.factory/validation/media/scrutiny/reviews/audio-transcription-translation-and-speech.json`.
